paper_title: XLNet: Generalized Autoregressive Pretraining for Language Understanding

raw_extraction.innovation: XLNet proposes a generalized autoregressive pretraining method using permutation language modeling, enabling bidirectional context modeling by maximizing expected likelihood over all permutations of factorization orders, overcoming limitations of BERT's masking and independence assumptions
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: BooksCorpus, English Wikipedia, Giga5, ClueWeb2012-B, CommonCrawl
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, reading comprehension, text classification
raw_extraction.research_problem: Bidirectional context modeling in language understanding
raw_extraction.paper_title: XLNet: Generalized Autoregressive Pretraining for Language Understanding

raw_extraction.innovation: XLNet incorporates Transformer-XL techniques including relative positional encoding and segment recurrence to improve long-range context modeling, achieving superior performance across downstream tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: BooksCorpus, English Wikipedia, Giga5, ClueWeb2012-B, CommonCrawl
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, reading comprehension, text classification
raw_extraction.research_problem: Bidirectional context modeling in language understanding
